description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The back features a prominent triple camera array housed in a raised square module at the top left, accompanied by a flash. The rear surface is a smooth, reflective material with a centrally placed, dark Apple logo. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels and a pill-shaped cutout at the top for the front-facing camera and sensors. The sides are flat and metallic, with visible buttons and ports along the edges. The overall color scheme is a deep, metallic purple with black accents, giving it a premium and contemporary appearance.
description: A sleek, metallic purple smartphone with a triple camera array, edge-to-edge display, and a central Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the triple camera array in the top left corner and a central Apple logo on a smooth, metallic purple surface.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slimness of the device and the protrusion of the camera module.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large, edge-to-edge screen with a pill-shaped cutout for the front camera and sensors.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the device's thinness and the raised camera bump.
attribute_brand_logo: A dark Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, contrasting subtly with the metallic purple surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a gradient wallpaper with purple and black circular shapes, and a pill-shaped cutout at the top for the front camera and sensors. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: There are three camera lenses arranged in a triangular formation within a raised square module at the top left corner of the back, accompanied by a flash.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible along the sides, likely including a power button and volume rockers, but exact details are not fully visible in the images.
